reason: While this is a standard STIG hardening pattern for account lockout, modifying PAM (Pluggable Authentication Modules) configuration carries an inherent risk of locking all users (including administrators) out of the system if the configuration is incorrect or if the authselect profile is not properly managed. The remediation script itself includes a check for authselect integrity, indicating that manual or automated errors can lead to authentication failure.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Potential for total system lockout if PAM configuration is invalid; Risk of breaking existing authentication workflows; Dependency on authselect profile integrity
